title: Inventory all existing MLB model data, shadow logs, trade history, and cached stats assets
objective: Produce a complete inventory of all MLB-related data already available for model rebuilding, including coverage, storage locations, schema shape, and obvious gaps.
paper_only_note: This is paper-only / observation-mode work. No model implementation or live strategy change is authorized from this task.
allowed_subsystems: runtime caches and stats artifacts relevant to MLB model rebuilding
forbidden_actions: Broad repo sweep outside the allowed MLB/data artifacts
required_work: 1. Inventory all MLB-related data sources currently present.
2. Classify each source by type: raw stats, engineered features, logs, outcomes, caches, model artifacts, or unknown.
3. Estimate date coverage and season coverage where possible.
4. Identify obviously missing or stale areas without proposing fixes yet.
5. Produce a coverage map and gap list suitable for the next gap-map task.
acceptance_criteria: Complete inventory list with file/path locations
Coverage estimate for each major artifact family
Obvious gap list separated from confirmed inventory
verification: Quote the major artifact families found
State what could not be determined from read-only inspection
